name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Where we started. Where we’re going.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
About 18 months ago, I had just started my run for Congress with a small team, operating mostly out of my kitchen. At that point, I had no idea how I would raise the amount of money needed to compete. I had no idea what attacks and hurdles would be thrown my way (only that they would be coming). I had no idea what my chances of winning were in a historically red district.
| | Peter,

About 18 months ago, I had just started my run for Congress with a small team, operating mostly out of my kitchen.

At that point, I had no idea how I would raise the amount of money needed to compete. I had no idea what attacks and hurdles would be thrown my way (only that they would be coming). I had no idea what my chances of winning were in a historically red district.

What I did know is that I couldn't stay on the sidelines after watching my representative vote to gut critical protections for Virginians with pre-existing health conditions. And I knew that I had something to offer my community as a career public servant, mom to three young girls, and proud Virginian.

What happened over the course of the campaign was nothing short of amazing. Our team grew to include over 5,000 volunteers and _ten times_ as many grassroots donors. **We shattered everyone 's expectations by working together, and that's exactly what we have to do this next time around.**

[**Today, I 'm asking you to become a 2019 founding donor of our campaign. Your early investment today will allow us to start building the strongest defense possible in this toss-up district.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zxhbEzEQQjJ1C3ecdnw1D0o83hXz2WDOwkVZd8IDM0=/DkvmvdADT1o-ypMkFP5cBHMvq7o8Xil05fGjGrvSm6U=?refcode=em_fr_2019.01.29_b1_as_all&amount=25)

We've set a goal of having 1,000 founding donors by the end of the month, and I'm hoping you'll be one of them, Peter.

[**Chip in any amount today to become a founding donor.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zxhbEzEQQjJ1C3ecdnw1D0o83hXz2WDOwkVZd8IDM0=/DkvmvdADT1o-ypMkFP5cBHMvq7o8Xil05fGjGrvSm6U=?refcode=em_fr_2019.01.29_b1_as_all&amount=25)

Thank you so much for your ongoing support,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zxhbEzEQQjJ1C3ecdnw1D0o83hXz2WDOwkVZd8IDM0=/DkvmvdADT1o-ypMkFP5cBHMvq7o8Xil05fGjGrvSm6U=?refcode=em_fr_2019.01.29_b1_as_all&amount=25)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zxhbEzEQQjJ1C3ecdnw1D0o83hXz2WDOwkVZd8IDM0=/5C4mZwuIA-M6la8gBYPMCIVVYhYqjBYJ7OacLVMmJUc=)_

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: We're moving to end Citizens United. Will you join us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | This month, we just passed the 9th anniversary of _Citizens United_. An unemployed single mother can't give a million dollars to an outside group to look out for her issues. A senior who relies on Social Security and Medicare can't give thousands of dollars to a special interest. Our government is supposed to work for the people. Our elections are supposed to be decided by the voters. **But all too often, in the 9 years since _Citizens United_ was handed down, it's special interest dollars on the right that have tried to unfairly impact elections.** We can't let this go on. As soon as Democrats took control in the House, we moved forward with real campaign finance reform. **Today, I'm asking you to join the movement.** [**Demand Republicans in Congress join us in ending the effects of _Citizens United_ once and for all.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cdb/622b7b5b/1e930b8b/307b752d/29995213/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e190127c") | | | [Add Your Name](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cdb/622b7b5b/1e930b8b/307b752d/29995213/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e190127c")
---
I will continue fighting until _Citizens United_ is a thing of the past.
Thanks for joining me.
Debbie

|

subject: President Trump Hits Venezuela with New Sanctions as U.S. Steps Up Pressure on Maduro
body:
"The Trump administration stepped up its pressure campaign on Venezuela’s socialist president Monday..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f58c5d02f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Hits Venezuela with New Sanctions as U.S. Steps Up Pressure on Maduro**

“The Trump administration stepped up its pressure campaign on Venezuela’s socialist president Monday, hitting the country’s state-owned oil company with sanctions and calling on other nations to recognize opposition leader Juan Guaido as the legitimate interim president,” Dave Boyer reports for _The Washington Times._

“The United States is holding accountable those responsible for Venezuela’s tragic decline,” Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin said.

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b9a707055&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9c8cf3d511&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Anna Giaritelli reports that U.S. Border Patrol officials seized bags full of rifles, handguns, and ammunition found near the southern border last week. “An unnamed citizen called the agency after seeing a group of suspected illegal immigrants carrying large bags on nearby land Friday. The area is about 25 miles east of the international border.”
---
|
---
| In the _[Indianapolis Business Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22f6f517f4&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Brad Rateike writes that after meeting with the women and men of U.S. Customs and Border Protection, it becomes clear that the crisis at our southern border is all too real. “In the coming weeks, we’ll continue to hear the president and Congress discuss next steps for border security. Whatever those may be, rest assured that after my trip there, I know firsthand that there is a real problem at the border, and there’s nothing manufactured about that.”
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump has donated his salary from the third-quarter of 2018 to the federal agency that researches alcoholism and alcohol-related problems. The White House says Trump donated $100,000 to the National Institute on Alcohol Abuse and Alcoholism,” _[The Associated Press](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2ba9e4c03&e=3ee4985eea)_ reports. “His older brother, Fred Jr., died in 1981 after struggling with alcoholism, and the president has said he learned from his brother's experience.”
---
|
---
| There is “a wave of disabled Americans joining or returning to the U.S. labor force, breaking a long-running trend that had pushed millions to the sidelines of work,” Eric Morath writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d88ad273d&e=3ee4985eea)_. “These workers have benefited from a tight economy with a very low overall unemployment rate—3.9% in December, just above lowest level since 1969.”
---
|

It's only the first month of 2019 but we've already learned a lot about how this year in politics is going to look.

I’ll keep this brief: within a few hours of Kamala kicking off her campaign for president on Sunday, the national GOP launched a nasty, false attack against our campaign. This is just the first of many attacks, and it proves what we already know: they’re scared of Kamala and the movement we’re building. **We need to fight back ASAP. Every donation towards our $500,000 end-of-month fundraising goal will help get Kamala’s positive message out in these critical first weeks after our launch. Can you pitch in a donation today to help us get there?** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190129-full&t=1&akid=2406%2E5755789%2E8vJGvs) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190129-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=2&akid=2406%2E5755789%2E8vJGvs)

Kamala’s rejecting corporate PAC donations into her campaign. That means every contribution -- no matter what amount -- matters. Whether or not we reach our first end-of-month fundraising goal will impact strategic decisions like:
* Where -- and how much -- can we afford to hire staff in key states with early primaries?
* How many organizers can we hire and volunteers can we empower with new tools?
* Can we afford to design, print, and distribute campaign literature and merchandise?
* How much budget do we have to invest in digital and TV ads to introduce Kamala to millions of voters?

If we’re going to run our campaign the right way, it’s going to take significant resources. But we wouldn’t set our goals so high if we didn’t think we could reach them.
Our campaign is being built FOR the people, BY the people -- which means refusing corporate PAC money and relying on a real grassroots movement to sustain our campaign.
**[Will you step up today with an investment of $10 or more to Kamala’s campaign for president? Your donation will help us reach our first end-of-month fundraising goal and invest in critical resources to grow our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190129-full&t=8&akid=2406%2E5755789%2E8vJGvs)**
Thanks for being with us.
— Juan
Juan Rodriguez
Campaign Manager
Kamala 2020
